raw_source.title: [Remote] TonUP is looking for CIS Region Director
raw_source.body:
## About
TonUP is an innovative platform built on the TON Blockchain that aims to revolutionize the way projects are launched and supported in the crypto space. It provides a comprehensive ecosystem for token launches, community participation, and project growth. TonUP is on a mission to discover and nurture the most promising projects out there, bringing exciting opportunities to the wider community. With the unwavering support of TON Foundation and Foresight X, they are dedicated to empowering assets with remarkable potential on the TON Blockchain, fostering the growth of a vibrant TON ecosystem.

## Responsibilities
**Investor Relations & Ecosystem Engagement:**

- Act as the primary representative between TonUP, the TON Foundation, and other projects in the CIS region.
- Maintain and strengthen relationships with current investors while identifying and engaging potential investors.
- Drive business development initiatives, identify key stakeholders, and foster strategic partnerships.

**Marketing & PR:**

- Develop and execute regional marketing strategies tailored to the CIS market.
- Lead PR efforts to enhance brand visibility and reputation, including crafting press releases and managing media relations.
- Coordinate with the central marketing team to ensure alignment with global marketing initiatives.

**Business Development Activities:**

- Organize and participate in both online and offline business development activities.
- Represent the organization at industry events, conferences, and other networking opportunities.
- Quarterly Planning & Budget Management:
- Present a detailed quarterly plan focusing on Objectives and Key Results (OKR) and Return on Investment (ROI) oriented strategies.
- Efficiently utilize the quarterly travel budget of $5,000 and the quarterly marketing budget of $15,000 to achieve set goals and objectives.


## Requirements
**Qualifications:**

- CIS Region Expertise: Extensive business development and market resources in the CIS region.
- Experience: At least 3 years of relevant work experience in business development or marketing roles.
- TON Ecosystem Knowledge: Strong understanding of and passion for the TON ecosystem.
- Tech Savviness: Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides), Slack, and project management tools.


## Job Nature

- Full-time 
- Remote 

## Salary and Benefits
$3000-$5000


## Contact
To Apply: Please submit your resume and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and interest in the blockchain/cryptocurrency/Ton Eco to elena.liu@msino.io

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

raw_source.author: ElenaLiumsino
